detail.description: Joey Wiemer singles on a line drive to left fielder Ian Happ.
Joey Wiemer triples (1) on a sharp line drive to center fielder Pete Crow-Armstrong.
Joey Wiemer homers (2) on a fly ball to left center field. Brady House scores. Daylen Lile scores.
Joey Wiemer singles on a ground ball to shortstop Dansby Swanson.

Joey Wiemer singles on a ground ball to second baseman Nico Hoerner. Joey Wiemer out at 2nd, second baseman Nico Hoerner to third baseman Alex Bregman to shortstop Dansby Swanson. Andrés Chaparro to 3rd.
Joey Wiemer homers (1) on a fly ball to left field.
Joey Wiemer doubles (5) on a sharp line drive to right fielder Carson Benge. Brady House scores. Daylen Lile to 3rd.
Joey Wiemer homers (3) on a fly ball to left center field.
Joey Wiemer doubles (2) on a ground ball to right fielder Jung Hoo Lee.
Joey Wiemer singles on a ground ball to shortstop Willy Adames.
Joey Wiemer singles on a ground ball to right fielder Jordan Walker. Daylen Lile to 3rd.
Joey Wiemer singles on a line drive to center fielder Justin Crawford. Daylen Lile to 3rd.
Joey Wiemer singles on a ground ball to third baseman Alec Bohm.
Joey Wiemer singles on a fly ball to center fielder Brandon Marsh. Jorbit Vivas to 2nd.
Nationals challenged (play at 1st), call on the field was overturned: Joey Wiemer singles on a ground ball to first baseman Bryce Harper. Drew Millas to 3rd. José Tena to 2nd.
Joey Wiemer doubles (3) on a sharp line drive to left fielder MJ Melendez.
Joey Wiemer singles on a ground ball to third baseman Bo Bichette. Jacob Young scores. Daylen Lile to 2nd.
Joey Wiemer singles on a bunt ground ball to third baseman Luis Rengifo. CJ Abrams to 2nd.
Joey Wiemer doubles (4) on a line drive to right fielder Will Benson. Jacob Young scores.
Joey Wiemer doubles (1) on a line drive to right fielder Jake Mangum. Jorbit Vivas scores.
